description: PR2 scenario #3 — wrong room type only. A section requires a lab room, but the candidate pool at the slot contains only lecture rooms. Gender and capacity would otherwise fit. Expected reason: NO_ROOM_TYPE.
notes: Today this falls through all three autoplace/rooming sites silently — the type check is implicit in the assign_best_fit scoring rather than a named gate.
cr == 4 sections are the ones that today pick up a lab meeting via the divergent duration>80+cr==4 heuristic. Stage 1 of the oracle checks type directly against RoomProfile.room_type.
